acceptance.assertion: The existing allowlisted board operator-ecosystem-heim-pc-20260719 is repaired in place; no replacement or duplicate board is created.
No Mermaid/source-code widget remains; exactly one materialized native diagram remains and no ai_generation_result preview object remains.
The old provider-autosized TABLE and DOC are absent; Frame 04 uses bounded decision cards and Frame 06 uses a compact evidence card.
Frame 05 uses neutral source cards and deterministic static direction symbols instead of provider-routed connectors that render with ambiguous arrowheads.
Two independent final provider readbacks agree on the exact stable digest and final object/type contract.
Desktop and iPad board captures are authenticated, fully rendered, selection-free and pixel-stable; diagram evidence includes device completeness and high-resolution readability.
Two independent board pixel reviews and two independent diagram pixel reviews all return PASS with no blocking visual findings.
Schauwerk visual delivery/review hardening is merged, CI-green and post-merge validated, and canonical documentation binds this work to T043.

approval.note: Implementation and live repair are already complete and independently verified. This planned registration exists only so Bureau can canonically establish T043 before applying its native verification stamp.

goal: Repair the existing Miro board operator-ecosystem-heim-pc-20260719 in place so Mermaid is represented as a materialized native diagram, compact frames no longer contain provider-autosized document/table artifacts, ambiguous connector rendering is eliminated, and release acceptance is bound to authenticated browser captures plus independent pixel reviews rather than structural quality alone.

id_collision_correction.reason: T040 and T042 are canonically occupied by unrelated tasks and must not be overwritten.

metadata.registered_from: authenticated visual acceptance and live repair of operator-ecosystem-heim-pc-20260719
metadata.resolution_summary: The existing board was repaired in place. Mermaid source, oversized DOC/TABLE artifacts and ambiguous Frame 05 routing were eliminated; one materialized native diagram remains with no AI preview object. Final provider truth is stable and authenticated desktop/iPad/high-resolution evidence passed four independent pixel reviews.

title: Repair and visually verify the Operator-Ökosystem Miro board
